title: The Woman Who Sailed the Soul
overview: Akira is a stranger in a strange land. As the locals decide his fate, he must learn what happened to Towasa and the world that left him behind.

title: In the North After Doomsday
overview: Akira needs answers. But between an android insisting on marriage and an aspiring storybook artist, his search for the past may lead him somewhere entirely unexpected instead.

title: Dancing with You Under the Rainy Summer Sky
overview: Despite Yugure's protests, Akira can't leave Amoru in the hands of OWEL. But a high-stakes rescue is the least of their troubles.

title: A Game of Lime and Allegiance
overview: Akira and Yugure are drawn into a double date as well as family baggage.

title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Doves?
overview: Akira learns more about the Ai War.

title: The Machine That Shouted Love at the End of the World
overview: Love is a complicated emotion. As Akira and Yugure go on a date, Amoru must wrestle with her jealousy.

title: Paper Songs of a Budding Primate
overview: Amoru's desperate search for her parent's banned storybooks leads her and Akira to a secured library.

title: To the Ocean Horizon Descends a Treacherous Swallow
overview: Akira's group hide from OWEL after escaping the library.

title: Overlooking the Expanse of Days Past
overview: They say true love conquers all, but sometimes, even love isn't enough. Especially when secrets and lies threaten to tear people apart.

title: His and Her Long Afternoon
overview: A single act of violence shattered Akira and Towasa's lives in the distant past, yet time marches on. What happened after that fateful day of the shooting?

title: "Don't Cry," She Said
overview: Amaru wants to be with Akira and Yugure, but circumstances make that an impossibility. But what if there was a way to make her wish come true?

title: Your Love Belongs to You
overview: Love is as messy as it is transformative. It can drive people to selfish extremes just as much as it can drive them to heroic sacrifice. In the end, what does love mean to Akira and Yugure?
